subcodes.first_line: O friends! In these days when the Sun of Manifestation is risen, and the Eternal Countenance is resplendent, and the Most Great Ocean of God surgeth with waves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان در این ایام که شمس ظهور مشرق و وجه باقی لائح و بحر اعظم الهی در امواج و
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcending the material condition, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
